_comment: MCP configuration template for Harness development environment. Use placeholders; do not commit real credentials. Copy to .cursor/mcp.json or use env-specific override; values like GITHUB_TOKEN, FIGMA_API_KEY, SSH keys must be set in environment or secret store.

shrimp-task-manager._description: Shrimp Task Manager MCP for task lifecycle (todo, in_progress, blocked, done). Required for plan-based and one-task-at-a-time workflow.

korea-investment-api._description: Korean Investment (KIS) API spec and verification. Use for any backend work touching Korea Investment API (orders, balance, market data). Required by project rules.

browser._description: Browser automation for E2E or UI verification (e.g. Playwright, cursor-ide-browser). Optional but recommended for frontend and full-stack checks.

recommendations: filesystem: workspace file access for docs and code.
github: repo, issues, PRs, and CI status for planning and verification.
shrimp-task-manager: task state and one-task-at-a-time enforcement.
korea-investment-api: mandatory for Korea Investment API development (see .cursor/rules/MCP.mdc).
browser: optional for UI/E2E validation and live verification.
